pages.title: Cobblemon x Create
pages.text: $(thing)Cobblemon: Create Industries$() bridges two of Aetheria's core systems — Cobblemon and Create. Instead of hand-crafting Poké Balls one at a time, build a full $(thing)production line$() using Create machinery to manufacture them at scale.$(br2)This addon adds custom recipes that turn raw materials into Poké Ball components through pressing, mixing, and assembly — all automatable with belts, deployers, and mechanical arms.

pages.title: Production Line
pages.text: Setting up your factory:$(br2)1. $(thing)Smelt Apricorns$() in a blast furnace or Create mixer to produce ball discs$(br)2. Use $(thing)Mechanical Presses$() to stamp discs into top and bottom halves$(br)3. $(thing)Deployers$() attach buttons and hinges to assemble the shell$(br)4. A final $(thing)Mixing$() step combines shells with iron and redstone for the capture mechanism$(br)5. Output finished $(thing)Poké Balls$() onto a belt leading to storage$(br2)$(italic)Tip:$() Different Apricorn colors produce different ball types. Set up parallel lines with color-sorted inputs to manufacture Great Balls, Ultra Balls, and specialty variants.
